title: Lexicon Model for Ontologies: Community Report
abstract: This document describes the lexicon model for ontologies (lemon/OntoLex) developed by the W3C Ontology-Lexica Community Group. The model provides a rich linguistic grounding for ontologies, including the representation of morphological and syntactic properties of lexical entries as well as the syntax-semantics interface, i.e. the meaning of these lexical entries with respect to an ontology or vocabulary. Modules cover the ontology-lexicon interface, syntax and semantics, decomposition, variation and translation, linguistic metadata, and lexicography.
